touches.ai_summary: Cold call to Rosa Shah, Head of RevOps at ArcPrism. Rep introduced call recording solution, Rosa mentioned they're currently evaluating options including Fathom. She expressed interest in learning more about automation capabilities for their sales team.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently recording and analyzing your sales calls?
questions_asked.answer: We do some recording but don't have a systematic process for coaching

questions_asked.question: How does your automation compare to Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: Rep highlighted unlimited automation tier and custom workflow capabilities

next_steps: Send overview email with pricing tiers
Schedule qualification call

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with product overview, pricing comparison, and case study from similar vertical SaaS company. Included calendar link for qualification call.
next_steps: Wait for Rosa to book qualification call

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Rosa. Discussed ArcPrism's current state: 17 AMs using mix of tools, no standardized coaching process. Rosa shared they're evaluating Fathom but concerned about scalability. Confirmed budget authority sits with VP Sales, not yet involved. Rosa owns the evaluation process.

questions_asked.question: What's driving this evaluation right now?
questions_asked.answer: New VP Sales wants to improve win rates and ramp time for new AMs

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in this decision?
questions_asked.answer: I'll loop in a couple of AMs for the technical eval, final sign-off from VP Sales

questions_asked.question: What's your implementation timeline typically look like?
questions_asked.answer: Rep outlined 2-week onboarding with dedicated CSM

next_steps: Rosa to share current pain points doc
Schedule discovery call next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery follow-up call. Rosa walked through their coaching workflow gaps. Mentioned Noah Brown (AM) and Grayson Wang (RevOps Analyst) should test the platform. Discussed timeline: hoping to decide by end of quarter.

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally close this out in 4-6 weeks, VP Sales wants something in place before Q2

questions_asked.question: Can we get a trial for Noah and Grayson to test with real calls?
questions_asked.answer: Rep confirmed 14-day trial available after demo

next_steps: Set up technical eval with Noah and Grayson
Prep demo focused on coaching workflows

touches.ai_summary: Sent technical eval prep email to Rosa with trial access instructions, invite to include Noah and Grayson. Included custom demo agenda based on coaching use case.
next_steps: Rosa to coordinate calendars for technical eval

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with additional resources: coaching playbook template, ROI calculator, and integration docs for their existing tech stack (Salesforce, Slack).

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce for logging call notes automatically?
questions_asked.answer: Rep confirmed native Salesforce integration included in unlimited tier

next_steps: Technical eval scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Technical eval session with Rosa, Noah, and Grayson. Walked through live call recording, AI summary generation, and coaching feedback workflows. Noah tested with recent customer call, positive reaction to summary accuracy. Grayson asked detailed questions about analytics and reporting. Rosa concerned about getting VP Sales buy-in without exec-level demo.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the coaching scorecards for our specific methodology?
questions_asked.answer: Rep showed customization settings, confirmed full flexibility

questions_asked.question: How does the pricing compare to Fathom for 17 seats?
questions_asked.answer: Rep noted Fathom charges per seat, our unlimited automation tier offers better value at scale

questions_asked.question: Should we schedule a separate session with your VP Sales?
questions_asked.answer: Rosa said she'll brief them first, see if they need a dedicated walkthrough

objections: Need to validate ROI internally before involving VP Sales
next_steps: Start 14-day trial for Noah and Grayson
Schedule formal demo
Rosa to brief VP Sales

touches.ai_summary: Formal demo with Rosa, Noah, and Grayson. Demonstrated full workflow from call recording through coaching delivery. Noah shared positive feedback from trial week. Grayson confirmed analytics meet their reporting needs. Rosa mentioned VP Sales is aware but hasn't joined evaluation yet - wants to see team consensus first.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we need to add more seats mid-year?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained pro-rated expansion pricing, no penalties for growth

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation take for 17 users?
questions_asked.answer: 2 weeks with CSM-led onboarding, another 2 weeks for adoption coaching

questions_asked.question: What's the internal approval process look like from here?
questions_asked.answer: Rosa needs to build business case for VP Sales, then get procurement involved

objections: VP Sales hasn't been directly involved yet, Rosa needs to make the case
next_steps: Rep to send proposal with 17-seat pricing
Rosa to present internally
Reconvene after VP Sales review

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal: $14,700 ACV for 17 seats on unlimited automation tier. Included ROI calculator showing estimated time savings and implementation timeline. Referenced competitive comparison with Fathom on value per seat.
next_steps: Rosa to review with VP Sales and procurement

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Rosa. VP Sales reviewed proposal but pushing back on price - comparing to Fathom's lower per-seat cost. Rosa advocating for our solution based on trial feedback but needs help justifying premium. Discussed potential discount or extended payment terms.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Fathom's pricing or get closer to their range?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained value differentiation but said could explore options within 10-15% discount

questions_asked.question: Is price the only blocker or are there other concerns from the VP?
questions_asked.answer: Mainly price - they like the product but CFO is strict on budget this quarter

questions_asked.question: What if we started with fewer seats and expanded?
questions_asked.answer: Rep noted that would increase per-seat cost, less favorable than 17-seat deal

objections: Price premium vs Fathom hard to justify to VP Sales and CFO
next_steps: Rep to discuss discount approval internally
Schedule pricing call with revised numbers

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled pricing call was rescheduled by Rosa - VP Sales had conflicting priority. Brief email exchange confirmed Rosa still championing deal but facing internal budget discussions.
next_steps: Reschedule pricing call for later this week
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call with Rosa. Rep offered 12% discount bringing ACV to $12,936, plus quarterly payment terms to help with budget. Rosa appreciated flexibility but mentioned VP Sales still comparing total cost vs Fathom. Grayson joined briefly to confirm technical requirements all met. No exec sponsor on the call.

questions_asked.question: Is this the best you can do on price?
questions_asked.answer: Rep confirmed 12% is upper limit of approved discount, highlighted ROI over 12 months

questions_asked.question: What would it take to get VP Sales comfortable moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: Rosa said needs to show clear ROI advantage over Fathom, considering building internal analysis

questions_asked.question: Can we lock this price if we sign before month end?
questions_asked.answer: Rep confirmed pricing valid through end of month

objections: Still evaluating total cost of ownership vs Fathom
next_steps: Rosa to build ROI comparison for VP Sales
Rep to send revised proposal with discount
Target decision by end of month

touches.ai_summary: Sent revised proposal at $12,936 ACV with quarterly payment terms and month-end deadline. Included expanded ROI analysis comparing unlimited automation value vs Fathom's per-feature pricing. Offered to present directly to VP Sales if helpful.

questions_asked.question: Can you send the competitive comparison in a format I can share internally?
questions_asked.answer: Rep attached slide deck with feature and pricing breakdown

next_steps: Rosa to present to VP Sales this week
Follow up end of week for decision timeline
